arts.ttl: French Giants Rekindle Interest in Napoli Loanee to Address Center-Forward Shortcomings
arts.sum: Perennial Ligue 1 champions Paris Saint-Germain have reignited their interest in Napoli loanee Victor Osimhen to reinforce their frontline. According to French news outlet RMC Sport, Les Parisiens have reached out to the Serie A powerhouse to gather information about the Nigeria international.
